subject: Economics
chapter: Employment: Growth, Informalisation and Other Issues

remember: Recall the main causes of unemployment in India
Identify the various types of unemployment
Enumerate the characteristics of informal sector employment
List the features of the informal economy
understand: Explain the concept of informalisation and its impact on employment
Describe the relationship between economic growth and employment
Discuss the role of education and skills in employment opportunities
Analyze the impact of labour market policies on employment
apply: Use the concept of labour force participation rate to analyze employment trends
Apply the concept of unemployment rate to understand employment issues
Use the data on employment growth to evaluate the effectiveness of economic policies
Analyze the impact of globalization on employment opportunities in India
analyze: Analyze the reasons behind the informalisation of employment in India
Evaluate the impact of economic growth on employment opportunities in different sectors
Compare the employment trends in organized and unorganized sectors
Analyze the relationship between education and employment opportunities in India

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT, the objectives of this chapter are to understand the nature and characteristics of employment in India, to analyze the causes and consequences of unemployment, and to evaluate the impact of economic policies on employment opportunities.
board_exam_objectives: The CBSE board exam tests the students' ability to recall and explain the concepts related to employment, unemployment, and informalisation. Students are expected to analyze the data and trends related to employment and unemployment, and evaluate the impact of economic policies on employment opportunities.
